title: Dino Nugget 3D Food
description: Turn meats into dino nuggets, and more !
body:
by Midonium
# Dino Nuggets !
\
This ressource pack changes **both** cooked and uncooked:
> beef -> Brachiosaurus\
> porkchop -> Stegosaurus\
> mutton -> T-rex\
> chicken -> Pterosaur\
> rabbit -> Parasaurolophus

But also :
> golden apple -> Spinosaurus\
> enchanted golden apple -> Ketchup dipped Spinosaurus

This pack includes **two language** : english(us) ; lolcat(us\

Version supported :
### Over 1.19 !

## STILL IN DEVELOPPMENT
I plan to add more to this texture pack, as I want to edit most of minecraft foods ! :]

Thank you so much for downloading Dino Nuggie 3D Food !\
I hope to see you again when there will be more here, currently working on fish update... :)
